title: Update Google Apps Script webhook URL

requirements.text: Update the booking form submission endpoint to use the new Google Apps Script web app URL: https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyNX8QzL8z7as3uaxUlXylX62hNZ4kx7Pt32mQKe9b1HSZCgD0fRgb2CicRVH7qQabvQQ/exec
acceptanceCriteria: The BookingForm component posts data to the new Google Apps Script URL
Form submission successfully sends booking data (name, email, phone, date, time, service) to the endpoint
Success and error responses from the Apps Script are handled appropriately

constraints: Preserve existing form validation logic and UI
Maintain the current booking form fields (name, email, phone, date, time, service)
nonGoals: Changing the form layout or styling
Modifying the Google Apps Script code itself
